list.title: AI Live Classroom
list.subtitle: Join a live session or create your own — AI teaches the lesson in real time.

dialog.title: Create a livestream room
dialog.topicPlaceholder: e.g. IELTS Speaking Part 2, Phrasal Verbs, Business Email…
dialog.topicHint: Shown publicly — students will see this on the room list.
dialog.lessonPromptLabel: What you want the AI to teach
dialog.lessonPromptPlaceholder: e.g. How to develop ideas in IELTS Speaking Part 2? Focus on answer structure, linking words, and common patterns.
dialog.lessonPromptHint: The AI will follow this guidance when generating the lesson. Leave blank to let the AI design it from the title.
dialog.languageViHint: The AI teacher will explain in Vietnamese — best for beginners.
dialog.submitError: Couldn't create the room. Please sign in again and retry.

recordings.emptyHint: Completed sessions are saved for 7 days.

rooms.emptyHint: Be the first to create one!

room.waitingStudent: Waiting for the teacher to start the lesson…

spotlight.hint: Tap the mic and speak — the class will see your words and the AI will respond when you finish.
spotlight.unsupported: Your browser doesn't support speaking. You can still type in the Q&A panel.

transcript.heading: Lesson content
transcript.empty: The lesson content will appear here as the AI teaches.
transcript.activeAbove: ↑ This slide is currently on stage

chat.heading: Q&A
chat.empty: Ask the AI teacher a question during the lesson.

quickChips.memorize: How do I memorize this word?

placeholder.default: Ask a question or tap the mic to speak…

footer.withMic: Mic · Up to {{max}} questions/min · Enter to send
footer.withoutMic: Up to {{max}} questions/min · Enter to send

system.lessonGenerating: The AI is preparing the lesson…
system.lessonFallback: The AI couldn't create a custom lesson — using a sample. You can still ask questions for detail.
system.qaStart: Lesson complete! {{mins}} minute(s) left for questions.
system.speakerInvitedSelf: The teacher invited you to speak!

room.explainAgainPart: Explain the "{{title}}" part again for me

replay.seekHint: Click to seek to a section
replay.noQa: No questions were asked in this session.

practice.label: Practice speaking
practice.unsupported: This browser doesn't support speech practice. Please use Chrome or Edge.
